typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Added tests still validate store behavior rather than DashboardQuickSwitchView error rendering and actionable Retry/Open Settings controls, leaving VAL-DASH-004 contract coverage unresolved.
New tests do not assert UI/accessibility announcement outputs for failure/success/recovery transitions; they rely on comments and data-layer checks, so VAL-DASH-008 verification remains incomplete.

The 1ns monotonic epsilon in this fix proved insufficient for persisted timestamp precision and was superseded by a later fix; the feature itself does not independently satisfy the stabilization goal.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require evidence-backed accessibility assertions for dashboard announcement fixes (assert posted notifications or accessibility value transitions), not comment-only tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fast-surfaces-add-dashboard-error-ui-render-tests and fast-surfaces-fix-dashboard-switch-failure-a11y-announcement added store-centric tests that did not validate DashboardQuickSwitchView UI announcement outputs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce manual UI sanity check evidence before allowing followedProcedure=true in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple fast-surfaces switcher-ui handoffs report followedProcedure=true with interactiveChecks empty despite skill step requiring manual checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit timestamp-precision guidance for Date monotonic checks (SQLite/GRDB round-trip tolerance expectations).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fast-surfaces-stabilize-backfillscheduler-idempotent-test used 1ns epsilon and required immediate follow-up with 1ms tolerance in fast-surfaces-fix-backfillscheduler-idempotent-backward-check.

rejectedObservations.observation: Require full 40-char SHA in handoff commitId.
Require context-read command evidence before setting followedProcedure=true.
